hooks.command: { printf 'ACE hook fired: UserPromptSubmit at %s PLUGIN_ROOT=%s\n' "$(date -u +%FT%TZ)" "${PLUGIN_ROOT:-unset}" >&2; }; SCRIPT="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}/runtime/hook_entry.py"; if [ ! -f "$SCRIPT" ]; then for ALT in ./plugins/ace-codex/runtime/hook_entry.py "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}"/plugins/cache/*/ace-codex/*/runtime/hook_entry.py; do [ -f "$ALT" ] && SCRIPT="$ALT" && break; done; fi; [ -f "$SCRIPT" ] && exec python3 "$SCRIPT" user_prompt_submit; echo '{}'

{ printf 'ACE hook fired: PostToolUse tool=%s at %s\n' "${TOOL_NAME:-?}" "$(date -u +%FT%TZ)" >&2; }; SCRIPT="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}/runtime/hook_entry.py"; if [ ! -f "$SCRIPT" ]; then for ALT in ./plugins/ace-codex/runtime/hook_entry.py "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}"/plugins/cache/*/ace-codex/*/runtime/hook_entry.py; do [ -f "$ALT" ] && SCRIPT="$ALT" && break; done; fi; [ -f "$SCRIPT" ] && exec python3 "$SCRIPT" post_tool_use; echo '{}'

{ printf 'ACE hook fired: Stop at %s\n' "$(date -u +%FT%TZ)" >&2; }; SCRIPT="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}/runtime/hook_entry.py"; if [ ! -f "$SCRIPT" ]; then for ALT in ./plugins/ace-codex/runtime/hook_entry.py "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}"/plugins/cache/*/ace-codex/*/runtime/hook_entry.py; do [ -f "$ALT" ] && SCRIPT="$ALT" && break; done; fi; [ -f "$SCRIPT" ] && exec python3 "$SCRIPT" stop; echo '{}'

SCRIPT="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}/runtime/hook_entry.py"; if [ ! -f "$SCRIPT" ]; then for ALT in ./plugins/ace-codex/runtime/hook_entry.py "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}"/plugins/cache/*/ace-codex/*/runtime/hook_entry.py; do [ -f "$ALT" ] && SCRIPT="$ALT" && break; done; fi; [ -f "$SCRIPT" ] && exec python3 "$SCRIPT" permission_request; echo '{}'

SCRIPT="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}/runtime/hook_entry.py"; if [ ! -f "$SCRIPT" ]; then for ALT in ./plugins/ace-codex/runtime/hook_entry.py "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}"/plugins/cache/*/ace-codex/*/runtime/hook_entry.py; do [ -f "$ALT" ] && SCRIPT="$ALT" && break; done; fi; [ -f "$SCRIPT" ] && exec python3 "$SCRIPT" pre_tool_use; echo '{}'

{ printf 'ACE hook fired: SessionStart source=%s at %s PLUGIN_ROOT=%s\n' "${HOOK_SOURCE:-?}" "$(date -u +%FT%TZ)" "${PLUGIN_ROOT:-unset}" >&2; }; SCRIPT="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}/runtime/hook_entry.py"; if [ ! -f "$SCRIPT" ]; then for ALT in ./plugins/ace-codex/runtime/hook_entry.py "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}"/plugins/cache/*/ace-codex/*/runtime/hook_entry.py; do [ -f "$ALT" ] && SCRIPT="$ALT" && break; done; fi; [ -f "$SCRIPT" ] && exec python3 "$SCRIPT" session_start; echo '{}'
